name: Debt Relief Bankruptcy Attorney
description_short: San Diego bankruptcy attorney offering debt relief, Chapter 7/13 filing, and alternatives to bankruptcy including debt consolidation and settlement services since 1991.
description_long: Scott A. Fleming, Attorney at Law, has operated a debt relief and bankruptcy law practice in San Diego, California for over 30 years, establishing a long-term presence in the local market. The firm specializes in bankruptcy filing services (Chapter 7 and Chapter 13) as well as non-bankruptcy debt relief alternatives including debt consolidation, debt settlement, and debt negotiation. Clients can access representation for wage garnishment defense, repossession prevention, foreclosure assistance, and creditor harassment mitigation. The attorney's approach involves reviewing all available options—both bankruptcy and non-bankruptcy pathways—during an initial free consultation to help clients determine the most appropriate debt relief strategy. The firm distinguishes itself through three decades of local practice, availability for weekday/weekend/evening appointments, and explicit positioning as a debt relief agency registered to help clients file bankruptcy. A notable strength is the commitment to exploring alternatives before bankruptcy, acknowledging that different financial situations warrant different solutions. The primary limitation is that this is a solo attorney practice with limited information about staff capacity, case volume, or specialization credentials beyond general debt relief services.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free initial consultation to review debt relief options and determine best course of action
30+ years of practice history in San Diego since 1991, demonstrating longevity and local expertise
Covers both bankruptcy and non-bankruptcy alternatives (consolidation, settlement, negotiation)
Specific expertise in stopping repossessions, wage garnishments, foreclosures, and creditor harassment
Flexible scheduling including weekday, weekend, and evening appointments for working clients
Credit counseling services available alongside legal representation
Located at street address (121 Broadway, #355, San Diego) with verifiable phone contact
cons: Website contains repetitive, low-quality content that raises professionalism concerns
No information about attorney credentials, licensing verification, or client reviews
Solo attorney practice with no visible information about staff capacity or case management
Generic descriptions of services without specific outcomes, success rates, or case examples
Legal disclaimer explicitly states no attorney-client relationship exists until written contract signed, which is standard but emphasizes transactional nature
best_for: San Diego-area residents facing wage garnishment, repossession, or foreclosure seeking immediate legal intervention
Individuals uncertain whether bankruptcy or debt settlement is appropriate and needing comprehensive options review
Debtors with multiple creditors and collection actions seeking consolidated legal representation
diagnosis: Best for San Diego residents in active debt crisis (garnishment, repossession, foreclosure) who need immediate legal action and want to evaluate bankruptcy versus alternatives. Primary caveat: This is a solo practice with limited web presence detail, so prospective clients should verify credentials, discuss case handling capacity, and clarify fee structures during the free consultation.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
